aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and authority signals. While they have basic SEO elements, they lack depth in content that aligns with AI search patterns.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with questions AI models prioritize.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks recent posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to third-party changes.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., address, geo coordinates).
No HowTo schema for common HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content tailored for AI search.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Pasadena' and 'HVAC maintenance tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with questions AI models prioritize.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, which are critical for AI citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, expand FAQ content, and create HowTo guides to align with AI search patterns.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground daily.
